name: d/d potato & duck recipe dog food
description: there can be a variety of reasons for a dog's itchy skin condition, including sensitivities to food. the good news is, most pets with these skin conditions can benefit simply by eating the right food. limited ingredient nutrition with a single, animal protein to avoid common allergens in dogs with food sensitivities free from soy protein high levels of omega-3 fatty acids clinically proven antioxidants
